stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Amsterdam Chart 11-3 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Which of the following statements is correct, for an aircraft category C?

options.a: After passing LCTR, descend to a height of 2000 feet.
options.c: After passing LCTR, turn outbound heading 310°, then intercept the localizer inbound on 183° after 1 minute.
options.d: Once established on the glide path, descent can be initiated at the pilot's discretion.
